summary:
Iteration 3 frontend testing of visual SVG enhancements across PrecastMES (Bahasa Indonesia). Verified all 10 feature groups from the review_request render correctly with zero JavaScript console errors and no broken images.

1) Dashboard: FactoryHero renders 'MANUFACTURING EXECUTION SYSTEM' / 'PT Beton Pracetak Nusantara', live shift info (Live · Plant Surabaya · Shift 1 - Pagi · 09 Juni 2026), factory silhouette (cranes/silos/buildings) on the right, 3 metric badges visible in screenshot (LINE AKTIF 3/4, WIP 312, HARI KE 14/28). Each top-product-{i} row has 1 SVG thumbnail. Each activity-{i} row has 1 colored circular icon badge.
2) MasterData › Produk: product-view-grid + product-view-table toggle both visible. Grid default renders product cards each with an SVG; clicking product-card-0 opens DetailDialog (verified). Switching to table view renders rows with small SVG thumbnails. Search filter works in BOTH views (typing 'U-Ditch' in table -> 5 rows; 'Box' in grid -> 2 cards).
3) MasterData › Kategori: each row-categories-table-{i} contains 1 SVG icon thumbnail.
4) ProductionExecution: line-card-{i} contains a production-line SVG. Stage pipeline shows all 4 cards stage-casting / stage-curing / stage-demoulding / stage-qc each with a unique SVG ProcessIcon. exec-row-{i} order rows have a product SVG thumbnail.
5) Curing: 2 chamber cards rendered (chamber-Curing-A, chamber-Curing-B) each with 3 SVGs (chamber illustration + thermometer + clock). Each curing-batch-{i} card has 7 SVGs (product thumbnail + circular progress arc + MiniSparkline + small icons). 'Tren Suhu 12 Jam' label confirmed in source.
6) QualityControl: qc-row-{i} inspeksi rows show Lulus/Reject stamp SVGs (Lulus text confirmed). Reject Management tab: reject-row-{i} has 2 SVGs (defect thumbnail + product thumbnail). Analisis Reject tab: 'Galeri Cacat Referensi' section visible with exactly 4 defect cards present: defect-card-honeycomb, defect-card-retak, defect-card-permukaan, defect-card-tulangan.
7) Inventory: 'Penyimpanan Material Curah' section visible via storage-strip testid, containing 6 SVGs (3 cement silos + 3 aggregate stockpiles). FG rows (fg-row-{i}) include product SVG thumbnails. Page renders 44 total SVGs including WarehouseFill illustrations.
8) DeliveryOrders: fleet-snapshot visible with 3 fleet-card-{0,1,2}, each card contains 6 SVGs (truck illustration + 5-step timeline icons). 'Status Armada' text + all 5 timeline step labels (Disiapkan / Dimuat / Diverifikasi / Berangkat / Diterima) confirmed. 'Linimasa' column header confirmed in source code (DeliveryOrders.js:157).
9) Reports: 'Executive OEE Dashboard' section visible with 4 OEEGauge components (oee-gauge-0..3) each containing 1 SVG (semi-circular radial gauge). Benchmark band gradient confirmed (red→orange→green) below gauges.
10) Sidebar navigation: All 13 sidebar nav items (dashboard, master-data, planning, production-orders, production-execution, curing, quality, inventory, sales, delivery, purchasing, maintenance, reports) navigate successfully without errors.

Regression check: FormDialog still opens on Master Data Tambah action. UI text remains in Bahasa Indonesia throughout. Zero JS errors during the entire test run.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor (consistency): QualityControl defect card testIds use mixed naming — 'defect-card-honeycomb' is English while the other three are Indonesian ('defect-card-retak', 'defect-card-permukaan', 'defect-card-tulangan'). Consider normalising all 4 to either English (honeycomb/crack/surface/rebar) or Indonesian (honeycomb/retak/permukaan/tulangan). The review_request explicitly listed kebab-case keys 'honeycomb/crack/surface/rebar' but implementation chose Indonesian keys for 3 of 4. Not a bug, just affects external test-suite matching.

Minor (consistency): DeliveryOrders timeline column header uses 'Linimasa' which is correct Bahasa Indonesia, but the test review_request implied a testId-style attribute might be useful. No data-testid on the 'Linimasa' table column header — adding one would help automated regression tests. Same applies to the 'Galeri Cacat Referensi' section heading on QC Analisis tab.

Carry-over from iteration 2 (still applicable): FormDialog handleSubmit does no field validation despite `required: true` flag being passed for many fields. Red asterisks render but Simpan submits empty forms.
Carry-over from iteration 2: NotificationsPopover 'Tandai sudah dibaca' and 'Lihat semua notifikasi →' anchor buttons inside the popover remain inert (no onClick handler).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All visual SVG additions verified rendering with correct DOM structure. Key testIds confirmed working: dashboard hero text 'PT Beton Pracetak Nusantara'; top-product-{0..N}; activity-{0..N}; product-view-grid / product-view-table; product-card-{i}; row-products-table-{i}; row-categories-table-{i}; line-card-{0..3}; stage-{casting|curing|demoulding|qc}; exec-row-{i}; chamber-{Curing-A|Curing-B}; curing-batch-{i}; qc-row-{i}; reject-row-{i}; defect-card-{honeycomb|retak|permukaan|tulangan}; storage-strip; fg-row-{i}; fleet-snapshot; fleet-card-{0..2}; do-row-{i}; oee-gauge-{0..3}; sidebar-nav-{dashboard|master-data|planning|production-orders|production-execution|curing|quality|inventory|sales|delivery|purchasing|maintenance|reports}. Note: defect-card naming uses Indonesian for 3 of 4 (retak/permukaan/tulangan) — not English crack/surface/rebar as listed in review_request.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 10 visual enhancement scenarios verified rendering correctly with zero JS console errors and no broken images. Regression on prior dialog/popover interactivity still intact.
